reviews.title: Promising Concept, Disappointing Execution – Proceed with Caution
reviews.text:
Last year, as an early user, I was genuinely excited about Nsave. It felt like a promising new fintech service that could bring real value. Initially, the ACH and card functionality worked reasonably well, and I had high expectations for what was coming next.

However, over time the experience has significantly declined. There is frequent switching of partners, sometimes every couple of days, which creates a clear lack of stability and consistency. On top of that, new accounts often have features disabled without any proper explanation or communication.

The support system is another major concern. Responses feel unstructured and unhelpful, and in many cases it seems like even the support team is unsure how to resolve issues. Instead of solutions, users are mostly just asked for repeated information.

The app itself is also very unstable for a fintech product. Basic reliability issues make day-to-day usage frustrating and unpredictable.

Another disappointing aspect is how feedback is handled. Even constructive criticism does not seem to be welcomed, and posts or comments are often not approved, despite active community participation and support from users like myself.

Most importantly, my ACH transfer has been stuck for the past 4–5 days. The only responses I’ve received are requests for information, with no real progress or resolution. This has been extremely frustrating and time-consuming.

As a result, I have withdrawn all my funds and do not plan to return anytime soon. Unfortunately, my trust in the service is completely gone.

reviews.title: Terrible experience — hidden fees and failed transfers
reviews.text:
I deposited $100 into my NSave account, thinking it would be a smart way to manage my money. I tried sending the money to another bank, but the transfer failed — and they still took $12 in fees. A few days later, the money came back to my NSave account, but with less than before.

Thinking the issue might be with the first recipient bank, I tried again with a different one. Same thing: another $12 fee, another failed transfer, and more money lost. No explanation, no support, no solution.

Now I’m left with just $35 out of the $100 I originally deposited — and for what? No successful transfer, no real service, just fees and frustration.

Avoid this app at all costs. It’s unreliable, expensive, and offers no accountability. I wouldn’t recommend it to anyone.

reviews.title: Lost USDT/USDC Deposit – No Resolution
reviews.text:
I deposited USDT/USDC to my nsave account using the details provided by the platform. The transaction was successfully completed on the blockchain, and the funds left my wallet, but they never appeared in my nsave account.

I immediately contacted support and provided all the required information, including transaction details and proof of transfer. After a long exchange, I was ultimately told that the funds could not be recovered.

This is extremely disappointing. When dealing with cryptocurrency deposits, customers expect a financial platform to have proper procedures to investigate missing funds and provide a reasonable solution. Instead, I was left with missing funds and no resolution.

My issue remains unresolved, my money has disappeared, and I have lost confidence in the platform. I cannot recommend nsave based on this experience.

reviews.title: Do Not Trust This App With Your Money – Highly Unreliable
reviews.text:
I have had a terribly disappointing experience with nsave right from the very start. What is supposed to be a secure financial platform has turned out to be a massive headache.
Here is why you should stay away:
 Constant Technical Glitches: The app is highly unstable and suffers from frequent crashes. To make matters worse, their stock exchange/trading system is constantly breaking down, leaving you unable to manage your assets when you need to.
 Disruptive System Updates: They push rapid, non-stop system updates that constantly disrupt the user experience instead of actually fixing the core stability issues.
 Skyrocketing Transfer Fees: Their transaction and transfer fees are exorbitant. What’s worse is that they keep increasing these fees rapidly over very short periods without clear justification.
 Terrible Customer Support: If you encounter an issue, don’t expect any real help. The customer service team is completely unresponsive, unhelpful, and unreliable.

reviews.title: EUR Account Lie
reviews.text:
I am writing to express my deep disappointment and frustration with the service I received from your support team. I recently opened a GBP account by mistake and needed assistance in closing it and opening an EUR account instead. Seeking help, I reached out to your customer support via chat, only to be met with an experience that left me feeling completely ignored and disrespected.



The agent I interacted with, Emanuel, was not only unhelpful but also blatantly dismissive. Despite seeing his status as “Active,” he barely responded to my concerns. When I asked about how to obtain my virtual card, he simply ignored my messages. The only response I received from him was that opening an EUR account takes time—something entirely unrelated to my actual question.



I cannot emphasize enough how disappointed I am. I expected professionalism, courtesy, and support, yet what I received was indifference and disregard. As a customer, I believe I deserve better than this, and frankly, this experience has made me lose trust in your service.



I urge you to take this matter seriously and ensure that no other customer has to go through such an upsetting experience. I would appreciate a prompt resolution to my issue and a response addressing the unacceptable behavior of your support team.

reviews.title: Name issues
reviews.text:
Dear Nsave Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I would like to share feedback regarding receiving payments from TikTok. Currently, it is required that the TikTok account identity must match the name on the Nsave account. However, in practical situations, this is not always possible.

Many of us manage multiple accounts, and sometimes we need to withdraw earnings from accounts belonging to friends or partners. Due to this restriction, it becomes difficult to receive such payments smoothly.

I kindly request that you introduce an option allowing transactions from TikTok to be received in an Nsave account even if the sender’s name is different. This flexibility would greatly help users who operate multiple accounts or work collaboratively.

Thank you for your understanding and support.

reviews.title: Extremely Bad Experience
reviews.text:
I had a very, very bad experience with NSave. I sent my hard-earned freelancing payment from Payoneer to NSave, and they held my money for over one week without any clear reason. I submitted support cases again and again, but there was no proper response.

After more than a week, they finally released the payment, but shockingly, they removed my ACH details without any explanation. This caused unnecessary stress and risk to my income. This was money I earned with a lot of effort from multiple clients.

I chose NSave for better currency conversion, but instead, I faced delays, poor support, and unprofessional handling of my funds. Completely unreliable service.

I strongly recommend not using NSave if you value your time and money.

reviews.title: Awful, Worst, Terrible, Pathetic
reviews.text:
Use with extreme caution. I’ve been using this app for two months, and my very first transaction was stuck for nearly a month. Thinking it was a one-off issue, I transferred an additional $20,000 — a decision I now regret.
It has been over four weeks since the transaction was reversed, yet I still haven’t received my refund or even a trace/reference number. Support provides vague responses with no concrete timelines.
Funds being held this long with no transparency is a serious risk. I would strongly advise others to think carefully before trusting this app with large amounts of money.
reviews.author: ChuchuKhan

reviews.title: Pathetic support - No ACH details
reviews.text:
It’s been over 2-3 months since I’ve been stuck on ID verification part which does not work as their partner sumsub has some issues. Each time upon contacting them, they respond with exact same message “We are aware of this issue and know how frustrating it is for you. We are working on fixing this” and then no updates.

Furthermore, I added money in GBP account but now I cannot withdraw because to withdraw from GBP, you need to convert GBP into USD and then withdraw USD which is only possible when you have ACH details.

I’d never recommend this app and that too dealing with people’s money. At least they must streamline their operational processes before launching the app in market.
